metadata.title: AlfarisTech — AI, Dev & Education Solutions
metadata.description: Faris Alkrenawi — Software Engineer & AI Specialist. Building production-grade AI systems, mobile apps, and web platforms for healthcare, fintech, and beyond.

hero.name: Faris Alkrenawi
hero.description: I build production-grade AI systems, mobile apps, and web platforms that solve real-world problems in healthcare, fintech, and beyond.

about.label: About Me
about.title: Building Intelligent Software That Makes a
about.p1: I'm a Computer Science student at Ben-Gurion University with a background in Mathematics from the Technion — Israel Institute of Technology. My passion lies at the intersection of AI and real-world impact.
about.p2: Certified in AI by The;Institute (with BGU, NVIDIA & Microsoft), I specialize in LLMs, RAG architectures, and ML models. I also bring over 4 years of experience tutoring 200+ students, which gives me a unique ability to translate complex technology into clear, actionable solutions.

ai.title: AI & Machine Learning
ai.desc: Custom ML models, RAG systems, and LLM integrations for intelligent decision-making. From clinical prediction to financial analysis.

mobile.title: Mobile Development
mobile.desc: Cross-platform iOS & Android apps built with Flutter and Firebase. From concept to App Store deployment with real-time backends.

web.title: Web Applications
web.desc: Full-stack web development with modern frameworks. Responsive, performant, and scalable platforms tailored to your business needs.

education.title: Tech Education
education.desc: University-level tutoring in mathematics, physics, and computer science. Complex concepts explained clearly, with 200+ students trained.

consulting.title: AI Consulting
consulting.desc: Strategic guidance on integrating AI into your workflows. Prompt engineering, agent architectures, and vector embedding strategies.

devops.title: DevOps & Cloud
devops.desc: Containerized deployments, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud infrastructure. Ensuring your applications are reliable, scalable, and production-ready.

oncorisk.title: OncoRisk EC — Clinical Decision Support
oncorisk.desc: Production system for Soroka Medical Center predicting endometrial cancer risk. Won hackathon award as sole developer, collaborating with physicians and approved by the medical board for real-world deployment.

nawaqeet.title: Nawaqeet — Event Management Platform
nawaqeet.desc: Full-featured event management platform published on iOS & Android, achieving hundreds of downloads in its first hours. Manages transactions, event announcements, and vendor directories.

netobox.title: NetoBox — Invoice Management System
netobox.desc: Smart invoice management with live Israeli tax calculations and automated receipt generation. Streamlines financial workflows for freelancers and businesses.

rag.title: Financial Hybrid RAG System
rag.desc: Intelligent retrieval system combining semantic and keyword-based search for financial data analysis. Uses vector embeddings and FAISS for rapid, context-aware results.

carnotify.title: CarNotify — Driver Alert System
carnotify.desc: Vehicle monitoring app for critical safety alerts — lights on, door open, and child detection. Designed to prevent accidents and currently pending regulatory approval.

client1.quote: Faris delivered our website on time and beyond expectations. His ability to understand our business needs and translate them into a clean, professional design was remarkable.
client1.author: Client

client2.quote: The Nawaqeet app transformed how our community manages events. Hundreds of downloads on launch day speaks for itself. Faris's technical skills and attention to detail are exceptional.
client2.author: Community Event Organizer

client3.quote: As a physics student, I struggled for months. Faris explained concepts in a way that finally clicked. I went from barely passing to scoring in the top of my class.
client3.author: University Student

contact.label: Get in Touch
contact.title: Let's Build Something Great
contact.subtitle: Ready to bring your idea to life?
contact.description: Whether you need an AI-powered system, a mobile app, a professional website, or technical education — I'd love to hear about your project.

success.title: Message Sent!
success.message: Thank you for reaching out. I'll get back to you soon.
